parts.text: I want to report illegal activity targeting my phone number.
I received a call about copyright infringement that seems suspicious and fraudulent.
I suspect fraudulent calls were made using my account.
I need help preventing unauthorized access to my mobile account.
Someone tried to change my account details without authorization.
I want to escalate this issue to the fraud department immediately.

I want to report an unauthorized activation on my account.

There are unauthorized changes on my account that I did not make.
